title: distichorchis distachya
intro: Distichorchis distachya, also known as the twin-horned orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Distichorchis distachya include its potential to treat conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and inflammation. The herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the roots and leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
